title: Kim Scott endorses Incorruptible
summary: Radical Candor author Kim Scott endorses Incorruptible as essential for founders building companies that will last a hundred years.
blockquote: If you want to build a company that will be making the world a better place a hundred years from now, it's not enough to be a great person with good intentions—you need to consciously build incorruptible governance. Ries shows you how. Indispensable!
